text:
The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who serve or have served in the Third United States Infantry Regiment as a guard for the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier and are awarded the Guard, Tomb of the Unknown Soldier Identification Badge. The license plates must include a likeness of the Guard, Tomb of the Unknown Soldier Identification Badge and must include the words “Tomb Guard” at the bottom of each plate.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.323 by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(64), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.324 — Tomb Guard

The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who serve or have served in the Third United States Infantry Regiment as a guard for the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier and are awarded the Guard, Tomb of the Unknown Soldier Identification Badge. The license plates must include a likeness of the Guard, Tomb of the Unknown Soldier Identification Badge and must include the words “Tomb Guard” at the bottom of each plate.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.323 by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(64), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 274 (H.B.2115), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2017.*
